meta.title: Treatment Areas | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko — Shoulder & Knee Surgeon
meta.description: All treatment areas of Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko: shoulder & elbow, knee, ankle & foot, joint injections and arthroscopic surgery. 37 years of experience, Maccabi clinics in Rehovot, Bnei Ayish and Rishon LeZion.

hero.title: Treatment Areas
hero.subtitle: From the first diagnosis through surgery and rehabilitation — Dr. Dubenko accompanies you at every step of the way. Choose an area to read about diagnosis and treatment options.

cards.shoulderElbow: Shoulder pain, tendon tears, instability and elbow injuries — precise diagnosis and a full range of solutions, from conservative care to arthroscopic surgery.
cards.knee: Meniscus tears, ligament injuries and cartilage wear — Dr. Dubenko's core specialty, with a clear preference for conservative treatment first.
cards.ankleFoot: Recurrent sprains, instability and sports injuries of the ankle and foot — from diagnosis to a full return to activity.
cards.jointInjections: PRP, hyaluronic acid, Orthokine and steroid injections — effective alternatives to surgery in suitable cases.
cards.arthroscopy: Minimally invasive surgery of the shoulder, elbow, knee and ankle — small incisions, less pain and a faster recovery.
